# ambientCG Assets

This directory stores CC0 PBR material assets used for VulkanRender feature demos.

## Rock064_1K-JPG

- Source: https://ambientcg.com/a/Rock064
- Download: https://ambientcg.com/get?file=Rock064_1K-JPG.zip
- License: ambientCG assets are distributed as CC0/public domain assets.
- Purpose: v2 Renderer72-aligned material demo for GPU texture sampling, roughness, normal mapping, and displacement/parallax preview.

Included maps:

- `Rock064_1K-JPG_Color.jpg`
- `Rock064_1K-JPG_NormalGL.jpg`
- `Rock064_1K-JPG_NormalDX.jpg`
- `Rock064_1K-JPG_Roughness.jpg`
- `Rock064_1K-JPG_Displacement.jpg`
- `Rock064_1K-JPG_AmbientOcclusion.jpg`

The original downloaded zip is kept in `downloads/Rock064_1K-JPG.zip` for reproducibility.
